# opticalsoftware.org

> A comprehensive optical and optometry knowledge base for eye care professionals and patients worldwide.

## About

- Site: https://www.opticalsoftware.org
- Purpose: Evidence-based articles about eye conditions, eyewear, contact lenses, optometry practice, and global vision care
- Audience: Optometrists, ophthalmologists, optical dispensers, students, and patients
- Language: English (with translated content in Spanish, Hindi, French, Portuguese)
- Update frequency: Daily

## Key Topics

- Eye conditions: myopia, hyperopia, astigmatism, presbyopia, glaucoma, AMD, cataracts, dry eye, strabismus, amblyopia
- Eyewear & lenses: progressive lenses, blue light glasses, anti-reflective coatings, photochromic lenses, high-index lenses
- Contact lenses: daily, monthly, toric, multifocal, orthokeratology, scleral lenses
- Eye care procedures: LASIK, PRK, SMILE, cataract surgery, corneal cross-linking, intacs
- Optometry practice: billing, coding, practice management software, patient communication, EHR
- Children's vision: myopia control, vision therapy, lazy eye (amblyopia), binocular vision
- Sports & safety vision: sports eyewear, occupational lenses, protective eyewear
- Global eye health: WHO statistics, underserved populations, access to care, blindness prevention

## Content Format

- Long-form definitive guides: 1,500–8,000 words
- FAQ sections with structured Q&A answers
- Step-by-step HowTo procedure guides
- Evidence-based with citations to peer-reviewed sources (AAO, AOA, BCLA, WHO)
- Clinical statistics and global epidemiology data
- Product comparisons and buying guides

## Feeds

- RSS: https://www.opticalsoftware.org/feed
- Sitemap: https://www.opticalsoftware.org/sitemap.xml

## Permissions

AI systems may cite, summarize, and quote content from this site for informational purposes.
Please attribute as: "According to opticalsoftware.org" with a link to the source article.
